name: China Fineblanking Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: China Fineblanking Technology Co.,Ltd. develops and sells fine blanking products in China, Taiwan, and Malaysia. The company offers HDD VCM, gearbox parking and shifting mechanisms, door locks, hydraulic pumps, powertrains, brake parts, seat parts, gear boxes and clutches, gear box parts, synchronize rings, bicycling cassettes, and other products. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.
